title: Text-to-image Diffusion Models in Generative AI: A Survey
description: This survey reviews the progress of diffusion models in generating images from text, ~\textit{i.e.} text-to-image diffusion models. As a self-contained work, this survey starts with a brief introduction of how diffusion models work for image synthesis, followed by the background for text-conditioned image synthesis. Based on that, we present an organized review of pioneering methods and their improvements on text-to-image generation. We further summarize applications beyond image generation, such as text-guided generation for various modalities like videos, and text-guided image editing. Beyond the progress made so far, we discuss existing challenges and promising future directions.

title: Generative Image Compression by Estimating Gradients of the Rate-variable Feature Distribution
description:
The advent of DDPM[30]can be mainly attributed to two early attempts: score-
based generative models (SGM)[31]being investigated in 2019 and diffusion
probabilistic models (DPM)[29]emerging as early as in 2015.

title: A Survey on Audio Diffusion Models: Text To Speech Synthesis and Enhancement in Generative AI
description:
With multiple works[19,22]reviewing the
progress of diffusion models in all fields but lacking a detailed introduction
to a certain specific field, some works dive deep into specific fields,
including audio diffusion models[25], graph diffusion models[26].
